help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitle: Common questions about BJJ App
help.faq1Q: How do I log a training session?
help.faq1A: Tap the + button on your dashboard, select the training type (Gi, No-Gi, Drilling, etc.), duration, and any notes. Your session is saved instantly.
help.faq2Q: How does the streak counter work?
help.faq2A: Your streak counts consecutive days with at least one logged session. Training after midnight counts as the same day until 4 AM (logical training date). Use Streak Freeze (Pro) to protect your streak on rest days.
help.faq3Q: Can I change my belt rank?
help.faq3A: Yes! Go to Profile and tap your belt to change it. If you get promoted, you'll see a celebration animation.
help.faq4Q: How do I change my email or display name?
help.faq4A: Go to Profile > Account section. You can change your email (a confirmation link will be sent) or update your display name.
help.faq5Q: How do I delete my account?
help.faq5A: Go to Profile > Account > Delete Account. Type DELETE to confirm. All your data will be permanently removed (GDPR/CCPA compliant).
help.faq6A: Gym Dashboard lets gym owners track student activity, send curriculum, and reduce churn. Students join via QR code and can control what data they share.
help.faq7A: Pro unlocks advanced analytics (12-month training graphs, body management, streak freeze), technique skill maps, and priority support. $9.99/month.
help.faq8Q: How do I export my data?
help.faq8A: Go to Profile > Account > Download my data (CSV). All your training logs will be exported as a CSV file you can open in any spreadsheet app.

gymLanding.heroDesc: Academy dashboard that tracks which students are training, sends curriculum updates, and catches at-risk dropouts before they leave.
gymLanding.feature1Desc: Automatically flag students who haven't logged training in 2+ weeks. See your at-risk dropouts before they disappear.
gymLanding.feature1Point2: Contact students before it's too late
gymLanding.feature2Desc: Link this week's technique from BJJ Wiki. All your students see it in the app. Extend class learning to their home prep.
gymLanding.feature3Desc: Generate a unique QR code for your academy. Students scan √¢¬Ü¬í auto-join your gym group. Zero friction onboarding.
gymLanding.step1Desc: Your students get the BJJ App from the web (no app store needed). They can use it solo or join your academy group.
gymLanding.step2Desc: They scan your academy's unique QR code. Instantly linked to your gym data. No forms, no friction, done.
gymLanding.step3Desc: See who's active, who's slipping, and send curriculum updates. Students get a stronger practice experience.
gymLanding.pricingNote: √∞¬ü¬ì¬© Email us for custom plans. 14-day free trial included.
gymLanding.waitlistDesc: Gym features are in private beta. Join the waitlist and we'll reach out when your spot is ready.
gymLanding.faq1A: No. Students use BJJ App free. You pay for the academy management features. Students benefit from curriculum pushes and their own tracking √¢¬Ä¬î no cost to them.
gymLanding.faq2A: No setup fee. No contracts. You can cancel anytime. Get your QR code and start using it immediately after signing up.
gymLanding.faq3Q: Can I use it with Stripe/PayPal for memberships?
gymLanding.faq3A: Right now, the app focuses on engagement & retention. We're planning payment integration for a future update. For now, use your existing payment system.
gymLanding.faq4A: No. Everything is done in the browser. Generate your QR code, share it with students, send curriculum via link. That's it.
gymLanding.faq5Q: What if students quit the app?
gymLanding.faq5A: The dashboard shows you who's active and who's not. You'll catch disengagement before students quit your academy. That's the whole point.
gymLanding.finalCtaDesc: 14-day free trial. No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
gymLanding.footerCopyright: ¬© 2026 BJJ App. Built by grapplers, for grapplers.

landing.heroDesc:
Track sessions, techniques, and streaks in one place.
Every day you log is a step closer to your next belt.
landing.heroSubtext: Sign in with GitHub or Google. No credit card needed.
landing.engDesc:
You drill a move. You forget it by next week.
BJJ App fixes that √¢¬Ä¬î log your sessions, save techniques with mastery ratings, and keep your training streak alive.
landing.engSubtext: No credit card. Sign in with GitHub or Google. Takes 30 seconds.
landing.step1Desc: Record every session. Date, duration, type, and notes in seconds. Works great on mobile.
landing.step2Desc: Your dashboard updates in real time. Streak, goal progress, and technique count at a glance.
landing.step3Desc: Spot your weak areas and fix them. Data proves your progress and keeps motivation high.
landing.previewSubtitle: Ready to use right after sign-up. Core features free forever.
landing.featureLogDesc: Track Gi, NoGi, drilling, comp, and open mat. Review your calendar anytime.
landing.featureGoalsDesc: Track your target with a progress bar. Turns green when you hit it.
landing.featureWeakDesc: Organize techniques by position. Star ratings show where you need work.
landing.featureStreakDesc: Auto-counts your consecutive training days. Hard to let it break.
landing.featureCalendarDesc: See your training days on a monthly calendar with color-coded type dots.
landing.featureSkillMapDesc: Build a mind map of your techniques. See the connections between positions and submissions.
landing.coreLogDesc: Log date, duration, type, and notes. Auto-totals your monthly sessions and training time.
landing.coreTechDesc: Organize techniques by position. Track mastery levels to spot and fix weak areas.
landing.coreStreakDesc: Automatically counts your consecutive training days. The streak keeps you coming back.
landing.coreSkillMapDesc: Mind-map your techniques. Visualize the connections between positions and submissions.
landing.wikiSubtitle: 4,000+ pages of free BJJ technique encyclopedia √¢¬Ä¬î beginner to advanced
landing.wikiLegDesc: Heel hooks, Ashi garami, Toe holds
landing.wikiNutritionDesc: Diet for BJJ athletes, injury prevention
landing.faq1A: Yes, all core features are completely free. Training log, technique journal, goal tracker, calendar, and graphs are all free. Pro plan ($9.99/month) unlocks unlimited Skill Map, 12-month graphs, and streak freeze.
landing.faq2A: Absolutely! White belts and blue belts are the perfect users. Built to solve two common problems: not remembering technique names, and staying consistent. Logging from day one makes the path to your next belt visible.
landing.faq3Q: How is this different from a notebook?
landing.faq3A: Three key differences: (1) Automatic streak counting √¢¬Ä¬î never lose momentum, (2) Visual graphs √¢¬Ä¬î see your growth in numbers, (3) BJJ Wiki integration √¢¬Ä¬î instantly look up any technique from 4,000+ pages. Data proves your progress.
landing.faq4A: Yes! Fully responsive and works beautifully on your smartphone browser. Add it to your home screen to use it like a native app.
landing.faq5A: Data is stored securely in Supabase (enterprise-grade PostgreSQL). Row Level Security means no one can access your data. Export everything as CSV anytime √¢¬Ä¬î no lock-in.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: No credit card needed. Sign up with GitHub or Google in seconds.
landing.coreBeltDesc: Visualize your journey to the next belt rank. Track promotions and stay motivated with detailed progress tracking.
landing.coreWeightDesc: Log daily weight and track 90-day trends. Set target weight goals and monitor body composition over time.
landing.proRollAnalysisDesc: Understand your winning patterns across opponents. See win rates by size, experience, and technique.
landing.proBadgesDesc: Unlock achievements as you progress. Celebrate 50 sessions, 10 submissions, and major milestones.
landing.proGoalWeightDesc: Set a target weight with visual progress line. Pro feature included in monthly/annual plan.

weightCut.title: Weight Cut Planner
weightCut.aggressiveWarning: This cut rate exceeds safe limits (>1kg/week or >10% body weight). Consider extending your timeline or consulting a sports nutritionist.
weightCut.phaseNormalAdvice: Train normally. Clean diet, slight caloric deficit. Focus on sustainable weight loss.
weightCut.phaseWaterLoadAdvice: Increase water intake to 6-8L/day. This primes your body to flush water efficiently later.
weightCut.phaseWaterCutAdvice: Gradually reduce water intake. Light training only. Monitor how you feel closely.
weightCut.phaseWeighInAdvice: Weigh in, then immediately rehydrate with electrolytes and light carbs.
weightCut.alreadyAtTarget: You're already at or below your target weight!

compGoal.title: Competition Countdown
compGoal.emptyHint: Add a competition to start your countdown
compGoal.tipEvent: Trust your training. Light warm-up, stay calm, and compete.
compGoal.tipTaper: Reduce volume. Light drilling and flow rolls. Focus on recovery and weight management.
compGoal.tipPeak: High intensity. Competition-pace sparring, game plan drilling, and mental preparation.
compGoal.tipRampUp: Increase session intensity. Focus on sharpening your A-game and competition scenarios.
compGoal.tipBuild: Consistent training with positional sparring. Start refining your competition game plan.
compGoal.tipBase: Build your base. Technique development, conditioning, and exploring new positions.
compGoal.proTeaser: Upgrade to Pro for AI training recommendations
compGoal.duplicateError: A goal with the same name and date already exists
